> ⚠️ **Do not paste real personal data, your CV, or petition contents.** niw-guru handles
> sensitive PII; keep this issue free of it. Redact paths and quotes. Security/privacy issues
> should go through [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md), not a public issue.

A clear description of the bug.

## What you expected
What you thought would happen instead.

1. Command run (redact paths): `niw-guru -s … `
2. Stage it failed at (Profile / Source research / Harvest / Endeavors / Summary):
3. …
